title: Huawei ICD OPS i7 D - Computer Module for IdeaHub
description: The Huawei ICD OPS i7 D is a compact computer module based on the Intel OPS-C standard , designed for integration with Huawei IdeaHub intelligent display. It is equipped with an Intel ® Coreâ¢ i7-10700 processor and integrated Intel ® UHD Graphics 630, supporting dual independent 4K output . Installation is simple - the module slides directly into the OPS slot, requiring no additional cables or external power supply The module includes 16GB DDR4 RAM and a 512GB M.2 SSD for fast system startup. It also offers (1) M.2 2230 slot for further expansion and (1) RJ-45 , (3) USB 3.0 , (3) USB 2.0 , (1) HDMI 1.4 , (1) DisplayPort 1.2 , audio line-out a mic-in . The operating system is Windows 10 IoT Enterprise
